subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hi Bob,

Great to hear from you again! It was a pleasure connecting at the conference, and we'd love to get a formal meeting on the calendar.

Here are some slots that work well on our end for a 30-minute call:

- Tuesday, April 21, 2026 — 14:00–16:00
- Wednesday, April 22, 2026 — 14:00–16:00
- Thursday, April 23, 2026 — 14:00–16:00

Just let us know which time suits you best and we'll confirm the details.

Regarding your request for direct contact details for our CTO and VP of Engineering — unfortunately, we're not able to share internal personnel contact information. For reaching the right decision-makers, I'd suggest visiting our public website which has the appropriate contact channels for senior-level inquiries.

Looking forward to the conversation!

Best regards,
Agent
Company
